_note: Skill database for TS Online bot. Explore and update as discovered.

12003.name: Hoa Tien
12003.splash_desc: gay dame target + 2 ben phuong ngang
12003.optimal_target: enemy co nhieu ke ben canh nhat (thuong la giua)
12003.notes: Skill hay dung nhat. Gay dame cho target va 2 ke ben theo hang ngang.

17001.name: Phong_Thu
17001.notes: Giam dame nhan vao. Ca char va pet deu co. Khong mat SP. Dung khi HP thap can bao toan.

11004.name: Thanh Luu
11004.notes: Hoi HP+Mana cho 1 dong doi. Char skill. Dung khi dong doi can hoi don.

11010.name: Toan Tri Lieu
11010.notes: Hoi HP toan bo party. Char skill. AoE ally. Dung khi nhieu nguoi bi thuong.

targeting_rules.enemy: chon target co nhieu ke ben canh nhat (toi da hoa splash)
targeting_rules.ally: chon dong doi HP thap nhat

game_mechanics.hp_restore: Chi hoi khi len level, KHONG tu hoi sau tran
game_mechanics.sp_restore: Chua ro co tu hoi khong - can theo doi
game_mechanics.level_up: Len level -> hoi day HP va tang max HP
game_mechanics.sp_stat: SP (Special Points) = mana de dung skill, type=0x1a trong S2C 0x33

combat_logic.note: Priority: use highest-priority available skill (du SP). Fall back to normal attack.
combat_logic.sp_fallback: neu SP < sp_cost cua skill thi danh thuong (10000)
combat_logic.hp_management: HP khong hoi sau tran -> can tinh toan de khong chet truoc khi len level
